landing.subtitle: Submit barren land with polygon mapping. Get matched with volunteers. Watch India's green cover grow — one verified parcel at a time.

main.title: Submit Land for Plantation
main.subtitle: Mark boundaries, provide details, and upload photos to get matched with planting teams.

login.hero_desc: We transform unused, barren and roadside land into verified green ecosystems — driven by community, data, and purpose.
login.instruction: Sign in to your TerraSpotter workspace to continue your work.
